swap.description: Residual hedge between note indexation (FRF/French CPI index ratio at 3.377%) and underlying facility cash flows. Facility tranches: inflation-linked A1/A2 (GBP RPI at 3.487% / EUR FRF CPI at 3.977%), fixed B1/B2 (6.631%/6.182%), floating C1/C2 (LIBOR+1.39%/EURIBOR+1.39%, +2% step-up post-June-2012). Guaranteed by FSA (now Assured Guaranty UK Limited).

collateral.description: Permanent Facility Agreement dated 20-03-2007 (drawn 28-06-2007). Syndicated loan facility: £1,500M + €1,965M. Six tranches with semiannual interest on 20 Jun & 20 Dec.

description: Tranche G6 Secured Index Linked Notes due 2041 — CLEF (Channel Link Enterprises Finance plc); €147M; coupon 3.377% × FRF Index Ratio (French CPI INSEE); guaranteed by Assured Guaranty UK (formerly FSA)
source_note: Tranche G6 from CLEF 2007 prospectus (Deutsche Bank / Goldman Sachs, dated 16 August 2007). €147M notes backed by Channel Tunnel Concession loans (CTG & France Manche borrowers; Groupe Eurotunnel SA parent guarantee). Coupon: 3.377% × FRF Index Ratio (French CPI INSEE, excluding tobacco, all households metropolitan France), paid semiannually 30 Jun / 30 Dec. Principal indexed to FRF Index Ratio with floor at par (minimum 1.0 for redemption). Monoline guarantee by FSA (now Assured Guaranty UK Limited, AA-/Aa3/AA). FRF Base Index Figure = French CPI level at issue date (August 2007). Index ratio at eval (June 2026) estimated at 1.36 based on cumulative French CPI growth since 2007.

index_linked_terms.underlying_name: FRF Index Ratio (French CPI INSEE, excl. tobacco, metropolitan France)

missing_contractual_terms: FRF Base Index Figure (exact French CPI level at issue date August 2007)
Exact FRF Daily Indexation Reference formula and lag convention
Confirmed current FRF Index Ratio as of evaluation date
Prepayment make-whole formula for G6 tranche
Full amortization schedule for underlying loan tranches
